# Invalid path glob (** not allowed) → exit code 3, no daemon contact.

mockd start
! agentctl run -f manifest.yaml
stderr '"/foo/\*\*" is not a valid path pattern'
mockd assert-method-called RunAgent 0

-- manifest.yaml --
name: bad
command: ["/bin/true"]
allowed_hosts: []
allowed_paths: ["/foo/**"]
